papers.title_en: Diseño de un Centro de Salud Mental basado en criterios de Psicología Ambiental
papers.authors: Valeria S. Calles-Palumbo, Carla I. Villalobos-Molero, Leonardo A. Badell-Gutierrez
papers.evidence: 可借鉴其以环境心理学作为医疗空间设计依据的方法，以及通过国际案例和专家建议提出设计策略；在疗愈空间研究中可重点关注患者情绪心理需求、空间人性化、自然连接、安全感和社会互动对康复体验的作用。
papers.tldr: 精神卫生照护空间常忽视患者情绪与心理需求，导致医疗环境去人性化并削弱就诊体验与康复过程。研究以环境心理学为设计准则，面向15至64岁、患情感障碍和焦虑障碍的成人，提出专科心理健康中心方案。通过国际案例分析与专家建议整合，明确自然连接、安全感和社交互动等空间策略。其意义在于把建筑设计转化为支持治疗、恢复和人本照护的环境工具。
papers.abstract_en: La presente investigación tiene como objetivo abordar el diseño de un centro de salud mental con criterios de la psicología ambiental. Para la investigación se analizó la falta de consideración por las necesidades emocionales y psicológicas de los pacientes con trastornos de salud mental, lo cual ha llevado a la deshumanización de los espacios asistenciales, viendo cómo esta situación puede impactar negativamente en la experiencia de los usuarios y su proceso de recuperación. Se propone un Centro de Salud Mental Especializado para adultos de entre 15 y 64 años que presenten patologías como trastornos afectivos y trastornos de ansiedad. La metodología utilizada es analítica, descriptiva y factible, basada en casos internacionales, con recomendaciones por expertos en el tema. Finalmente, se sugiere la implementación de este tipo de edificación para la atención especializada de pacientes con trastornos de salud mental, debido a su contribución en la recuperación de estos pacientes al proporcionar un ambiente terapéutico y seguro, promoviendo la conexión a la naturaleza, su entorno y la interacción social.

papers.title_en: Virtual reality-enhanced analysis of Siheyuan spatial perception: electroencephalography, galvanic skin response, and surveys
papers.authors: Hanbing Liu, Wen Lu, Xiaofan Zhu, Ning Li, Fan Zhang
papers.evidence: 可借鉴其将VR场景、脑电、皮肤电反应和问卷结合，用于评估特定建筑空间感知的方法框架。
papers.tldr: 四合院空间体验涉及尺度、围合、序列与情绪反应，但传统问卷难捕捉即时生理感知。论文以虚拟现实重建四合院场景，结合脑电、皮肤电反应与主观调查分析空间感知。现有摘要未披露具体样本、统计结果或显著性结论，但题名显示其重点在多模态评估框架。贡献在于把沉浸式VR与神经生理指标引入传统院落空间研究。
papers.abstract_en: Virtual reality-enhanced analysis of Siheyuan spatial perception: electroencephalography, galvanic skin response, and surveys

papers.title_en: The association between objective and perceived bird diversity and the mental health of minoritized communities living near disused parks in Detroit
papers.authors: Christopher J. Dennison, Katherine Mason, Amber L. Pearson, Rachel T. Buxton
papers.evidence: 可借鉴其将客观环境特征与主观环境感知同时纳入心理健康研究的思路，用于评估公园、绿地或疗愈空间的健康效应。
papers.tldr: 底特律废弃公园周边的少数族裔社区可能同时面临环境失管与心理健康风险，而鸟类多样性或许是影响日常自然体验的重要生态因素。研究聚焦客观鸟类多样性与居民主观感知多样性，并考察二者同心理健康的关联。由于摘要未给出设计、样本和统计结果，当前只能判断其贡献在于把城市生物多样性、公园衰败与环境公平议题连接起来。
papers.abstract_en: The association between objective and perceived bird diversity and the mental health of minoritized communities living near disused parks in Detroit

papers.title_en: From Flat Screens To Immersive Virtual Reality: How Virtual Reality Influences Subjective And Objective Performance In Digital Sports
papers.authors: Dennis Lauer, Jens-Christian Stoetzer, Nina Weber, Florian Weiß, Christoph Buck, Tobias Guggenberger
papers.evidence: 可借鉴其3D VR与2D屏幕对照实验、主观与客观表现结合评估、临场感和沉浸感作为中介变量的分析框架，用于研究虚拟体育空间中空间体验如何影响行为表现。
papers.tldr: 数字体育正从平面屏幕转向沉浸式VR，但这种显示方式变化如何影响玩家主观体验与客观表现仍不清楚。研究让80名玩家在2D或3D VR条件下完成同一数字运动任务，并比较表现差异及临场感、沉浸感的中介作用。结果显示VR组主观与客观表现更好，临场感同时提升两类表现，沉浸感仅提升主观表现。研究表明绩效增益主要来自玩家体验而非VR技术本身，为数字体育的界面升级提供证据。
papers.abstract_en: Digital sports increasingly adopt Virtual Reality (VR), enabling players to perform in immersive VR conditions rather than via non-immersive screen-based conditions. Yet little is known about how this display modality shift affects subjective and objective performance. In a between-subject experimental design, 80 players completed the same digital sports task in a 3D vs. 2D condition. Direct comparisons show that the immersive VR condition improves subjective and objective performance. When presence and immersion are included as mediators, presence enhances both performance measures, whereas immersion influences only subjective performance. The direct effect of the display modality becomes non-significant, indicating that performance improvements stem from players’ experience of digital sports rather than from VR technology itself. Extending prior work that mainly examined subjective or isolated performance dimensions, this study considers both subjective and objective performance from a holistic perspective. Our findings suggest that such a display modality shift could enhance players’ performance.

papers.title_en: Geographically weighted machine learning for modeling spatial heterogeneity and nonlinearity in dockless bike-sharing and built environment connection
papers.authors: Tiantian Liu, Jiaqi Liu, Liya Yang, Zhiyong Cui, Chuan Ding
papers.evidence: 可借鉴地理加权机器学习方法，用于分析空间环境变量与行为结果之间的空间异质性和非线性关系。
papers.tldr: 无桩共享单车使用与建成环境的关系往往随空间位置变化，并包含复杂非线性，传统全局线性模型难以刻画。论文引入地理加权机器学习，将空间局部建模与机器学习预测能力结合。研究聚焦识别不同区域中建成环境因素对骑行需求的差异化影响。其意义在于为精细化单车投放、街区更新和出行治理提供更具空间针对性的证据。
papers.abstract_en: Geographically weighted machine learning for modeling spatial heterogeneity and nonlinearity in dockless bike-sharing and built environment connection

papers.title_en: Assessing realism in virtual architecture: Neural and subjective responses to changes in level of detail
papers.authors: Uemee Jung, Kyujin Choi, Soyeong Kim, Jongho Lee, Dongwook Sohn
papers.evidence: 可借鉴其将虚拟建筑细节层级作为环境变量，并结合神经反应与主观反应评估空间真实感的方法，用于VR建筑空间体验或环境感知研究。
papers.tldr: 虚拟建筑的真实感会受到模型细节层级影响，但单靠主观评分难以解释体验差异。本文围绕建筑场景的细节层级变化，同时考察神经反应与主观真实感评价。摘要未给出具体实验参数和定量结论，但研究意图是比较不同细节呈现对感知真实的影响。其贡献在于把脑响应指标引入虚拟建筑真实性评估，为VR建筑设计与渲染取舍提供证据框架。
papers.abstract_en: Assessing realism in virtual architecture: Neural and subjective responses to changes in level of detail

papers.title_en: Investigating extra environmental exposure in bike-sharing trips: spatial patterns and built environment factors
papers.authors: Zijian Guo, Mei-Po Kwan, Jian Liu, Xintao Liu
papers.evidence: 可借鉴其将共享单车出行、环境暴露、空间模式与建成环境因素关联分析的研究思路，用于评估骑行空间环境对行为路径和环境暴露的影响。
papers.tldr: 本文关注共享单车出行中因路径选择、绕行或停留带来的额外环境暴露问题，并将其置于城市空间差异中考察。研究围绕出行空间模式与建成环境因素展开，可能结合共享单车行程、环境暴露指标和城市形态变量进行分析。其重点在于识别哪些区域与何种建成环境特征会放大骑行者额外暴露，从而为健康导向的骑行基础设施、站点布局和城市设计提供依据。
papers.abstract_en: Investigating extra environmental exposure in bike-sharing trips: spatial patterns and built environment factors

papers.title_en: Assessing the Impact of Extreme Climate Events on Cardiovascular Disease in 157 Chinese Cities (2015-2020): A Spatial and Causal Analysis.
papers.authors: Wei L, Liang Y, Wang X, Zhang W, Zhang L, Fang Y.
papers.evidence: 可借鉴其将极端热、冷、降水作为环境暴露变量，并结合空间自相关、地理与时间加权回归和因果推断评估健康风险的方法；可用于健康促进环境或城市公共空间研究中的气候暴露分区、脆弱人群识别和空间健康风险评估。
papers.tldr: 极端气候事件正加重中国中老年人心血管疾病负担，但既往研究缺少城市尺度空间证据和个体因果验证。研究整合2015—2020年157个城市数据与纵向队列，采用空间自相关、多尺度时空加权回归和动态双重机器学习。结果显示高温、低温和强降水均提高发病风险，高温效应最强且存在明显东西梯度，并识别出退休前人群、吸烟者、高臭氧地区居民等脆弱亚群。研究为气候适应型心血管防控提供了更细颗粒度依据。
papers.abstract_en:
Introduction

Extreme climate events worsen cardiovascular disease burden, exacerbated by rapid aging. Prior studies have linked extreme climate events to cardiovascular disease mortality but have lacked city-level spatial extreme climate event impact data and causal evidence for extreme climate event-related cardiovascular diseases in individuals. This study explored the spatiotemporal patterns of 3 extreme climate event types (heat, cold, and precipitation) in 157 Chinese cities (2015-2020) and verified their causal effects on individual incident cardiovascular disease risk.

Methods

A repeated cross-sectional (spatial analysis) and longitudinal cohort (causal inference) mixed design was used. Extreme climate events were defined using 2 thresholds: absolute (heat ≥38°C, cold ≤ -10°C, and extreme precipitation >50 mm) and relative. Subsequent analyses and results were based on the absolute threshold, which provided a better model fit. Spatial autocorrelation was used to identify cardiovascular disease clusters, multiscale geographically and temporally weighted regression was used to quantify extreme climate event city-level cardiovascular disease associations, and dynamic double machine learning was used to examine individual causality/heterogeneity.

Results

Northeast China's cities were found to be sites of increased cardiovascular disease incidence. Heat extreme climate events increased city-level cardiovascular disease prevalence (east-west weakening impact). Each additional heat extreme climate event day was correlated with 1,128 more cardiovascular disease cases per 100,000 people. Cold extreme climate events increased city-level cardiovascular disease prevalence (west-east weakening impact). Each additional cold extreme climate event day was correlated with 391 more cardiovascular disease cases per 100,000 people. Causal inference analysis showed that each heat extreme climate event day increased cardiovascular disease risk by 3.044%; cold extreme climate event days increased risk by 0.110%, and precipitation extreme climate event days increased it by 1.620%. Heterogeneity highlighted high-risk subgroups in which heat extreme climate events affected preretirees, smokers, and those in high-ozone areas, whereas higher BMI values mitigated risk. Cold extreme climate events impacted preretirees, high-BMI individuals, and high-ozone populations. Precipitation extreme climate events most affected older adults, rural residents, preretirees, and spouseless individuals.

Conclusions

Heat and cold extreme climate events increased city-level cardiovascular disease prevalence in middle-aged and older adults with distinct spatiotemporal gradients. Exposure to heat, cold, and precipitation extreme climate events significantly increased incident cardiovascular disease risk, with clear subgroup vulnerabilities.
